summary: Retest of Homepage 'Reset section to defaults' flow. The described fix (removal of window.confirm) was NOT applied to /app/frontend/src/components/AdminHomepage.jsx — line 233 still contains 'if (!window.confirm(...)) return;'. Browser test confirmed: after saving 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE' and clicking 'Reset section to defaults', a confirm dialog fired ('Reset "Hero Section" to defaults?') and the input value did NOT revert to the default 'Where glass is a family heirloom.' — it remained 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE'. Regression checks on nav-admin absence and public homepage loading still pass.
passed: Save with 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE' persisted (input showed value after save; also visible on public homepage)

failed.issue: Fix described in the request was NOT applied. window.confirm() still present at line 233 and it BLOCKS the reset. After clicking 'Reset section to defaults', input value stayed 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE' instead of becoming 'Where glass is a family heirloom.'
failed.evidence: Playwright dialog listener captured: type=confirm, msg='Reset "Hero Section" to defaults?'. Post-reset input value logged: 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE'. grep of source shows line 233: `if (!window.confirm(...)) return;`

failed.issue: Because reset failed and a second Save was executed by the test, the public homepage now shows 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE' as the hero headline. Once the reset fix is truly applied, main agent should re-run reset+save (or restore default) to clean prod data.
failed.evidence: Public GET / shows headline 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE' in h1/h2 list.

action_items: Actually apply the described fix in /app/frontend/src/components/AdminHomepage.jsx: replace lines 232-235 to remove window.confirm and deep-clone: `const resetSection = (k) => setState({ ...state, [k]: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(HOMEPAGE_DEFAULTS[k])) });` and toast 'reset — click Save to publish'.
After fix, reset the atelier/hero headline back to 'Where glass is a family heirloom.' and save to clean up the leaked 'TEST_RESET_HEADLINE' from production homepage.
